speaker: speaker1
text: What do you usually have for breakfast ? Pancakes or waffles ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I usually have cereal for breakfast .

speaker: speaker1
text: But isn't it served with cold milk ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah . Cold milk wakes me up .

speaker: speaker1
text: Chinese people don't like to eat cold food .

speaker: speaker1
text: But I'm open to new things . I'll have a bowl of cereal , too .
